nav.logoutAllConfirm: Sign out of all devices? Sessions on your other phones/computers will end too.

auth.title: Ishbor Skill Verification
auth.subtitle: Pass the test to earn a Verified badge.
auth.name: Name
auth.roleSeekerHint: Pass the test and post your resume.
auth.passwordPolicyHint: At least 8 characters: uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol (e.g. !@#$).
auth.passwordPolicyError: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number, and a symbol.

jobs.title: Job listings
jobs.subtitle: Employers and job seekers in one place — filter by direction and level.
jobs.searchPlaceholder: Search by role, company or candidate…
jobs.noRating: This user hasn't taken the skill assessment yet.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Users with the highest scores.
leaderboard.empty: No one has taken the test yet.

post.title: New listing
post.employerHint: Post a vacancy — no test required.
post.seekerNote: This is your verified level — it will be attached to your resume.
post.resumeTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Looking for a Junior Frontend Developer role
post.lockedBody: To post a resume you must first pass the skill test and become verified.
post.verifiedNote: You are verified — you can post listings.

test.title: Skill test
test.selectIntro: Choose your direction and mark the technologies you know. You'll get the hardest questions for each.
test.notAnswered: Not answered — counts as wrong when time runs out

result.late: Submitted after the deadline — the result was flagged as expired.

proctor.violationBody: You left the test window. This has been logged as a violation — exceeding the limit will end the test automatically.
proctor.violationBodyCopyPaste: Copy or paste was detected. This has been logged as a violation — exceeding the limit will end the test automatically.
proctor.violationBodyRightClick: Right-click / context menu was detected. This has been logged as a violation — exceeding the limit will end the test automatically.
proctor.violationBodyScreenshot: A screenshot attempt (PrintScreen) was detected. This has been logged as a violation — exceeding the limit will end the test automatically.
proctor.violationBodyDevtools: The browser DevTools panel was detected as open. This has been logged as a violation — exceeding the limit will end the test automatically.
proctor.violationRemaining: {remaining} more and the test will be terminated.
